title: The AI problem nobody is talking about
description: The technology works. The problem is everything around it.

title: Alberta college reinvents career fair for new reality of AI job hunting
description: NorQuest College instructor Mahbub Mishu knows artificial intelligence is a game changer when it comes to landing a job.“It’s about how good your profile picture is, how strong your bio is and keywords designed to attract recruiters nowadays,” said Mishu, who teaches in the machine learning analyst program at Norquest . It’s why he supervised a team of his tech students to design online resume games, as a new addition to this year’s career fair.

title: Fake Iran images show AI used as a weapon of 'public opinion,' USF experts say
RadNet's Pullback Offers Upside With Outpatient Imaging And AI
OpenAI Launches Codex Security AI Agent for Automated Code Security Analysis
description: OpenAI has been in the spotlight recently following the launch of GPT-5.4 and Microsoft’s rapid integration of the new agentic coding model into GitHub Copilot. Now the company is expanding its developer tools portfolio with a major security-focused upgrade. OpenAI has rebranded its security researcher agent Aardvark as Codex Security, introducing the tool in research [...]
